Kupite praéÀkasti sok od jagode (ili rum punáa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaái joéÀ koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliáno.

Istresite teánost i jaja stavite na radnu povréÀinu da se osuéÀe, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih premaéƒite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

é to se tiáe éƒutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorandéƒe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u siráetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.

it.title: Dipingi le uova senza sostanze chimiche nel modo originale - abbastanza naturale

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Milorad Tomiá - LoéÀe je proéÀao svako ko nije áutao i trpeo Velju Nevolju! (24.3.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Milorad Tomiá ToéÀa, áovek koji je prkosio momcima s vrelog asfalta. Kao mladiá koji se bavio sportom poáeo je da radi na ulazima klubova i tako je upoznao mnoge, gotovo sve, poznate éƒestoke momke. Svoj posao je obavljao profesionalno bez izuzetka, ne dozvoljavajuái ikome da kréÀi pravila lokala. Tamo gde je on radio ni najpoznatiji éƒestoki momci nisu mogli da prave haos. To ga je dovodilo u teéÀke, a nekada i po éƒivot opasne situacije. Ipak, tvrdi da ga nikada nije zanimalo ko je ko od tih ljudi, veá samo da li naruéÀavaju red u objektu. I momci kao éÀto su Arkan, Zlatko Bagariá, Mihajlo Divac i ostali nailazili su na otpor kada bi se ponaéÀali neprikladno. Osim u klubovima, ToéÀa je jedno vreme bio telohranitelj Vojislava é eéÀelja i iz tog vremena nosi veliki broj anegdota i uspomena. O svemu ovome govori u svojim knjigama, a i ekskluzivno za gledaoce BALKAN INFO produkcije otvoreno i po prvi put govori o svojoj proéÀlosti i raznim situacijama koje je doéƒiveo. Preporuáujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viéÀe o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! Þ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ã¤ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ã¤https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ã¤https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-ôÙfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

Listen to the Sky News Daily podcast on the impact of the cargo ship's blockage of the Suez Canal - https://news.sky.com/story/wedged-in-the-suez-how-a-mega-ship-brought-the-canal-to-a-standstill-12261097

He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherãs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewãÎ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleãs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KáÝráÝmláÝ family. snippet.title: Biden seems confused at times during first official press conference | New York Post
snippet.description:
President Biden appeared to repeatedly lose his train of thought early on in his first press conference as commander-in-chief Thursday, asking reporters if they wanted him to go into detail in his answers, forgetting questions and relying heavily on cue cards from a binder he brought along.

The president took ten questions at the 62 minute presser, repeatedly consulting his binder before calling on the next reporter.

The three-ring binder also held the opening remarks he delivered at the start of the briefing, as well as notes on topics of major concern he was likely to be asked about.

The first awkward moment occurred while the president was answering a question on the crisis at the southern border from PBS journalist Yamiche Alcindor.

#JoeBiden #PressConference

snippet.description:

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialãã
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterãã
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeãã

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaã #FutureNostalgiaã #Grammys

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyãs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jimãs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.description:

Itãs Saturday morning, so you know what time it isãÎ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

Weãve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing whoãs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think itãll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the Lamboãs bonnet, youãll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But thatãs not allãÎ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? Thereãs only one way to find outãÎ LETãS RACE!

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.
